\tzpentry{ID5276}{Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5276 introduces Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(A_{\text{gyro}} = (\mu_0/4\pi) \int_{V_{\text{gyro}}} J_{\text{gyro}}(r',t) \times (r - r')/|r - r'|^3 \; d^3r'\)
\]
